demo.title: wallettriage.sh
demo.code:
# Is this address safe to interact with? ($0.01)
bankr prompt "Use wallettriage to scan 0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045 on eth"

# Audit my own wallet's approvals against live exploits ($0.01)
bankr prompt "Run a wallettriage scan on my wallet on base — what should I revoke first?"

# Gate a transfer on counterparty risk ($0.01)
bankr prompt "Before sending, wallettriage-scan the recipient; abort if risk_level is high or critical"

# Service status + threat feed freshness (free)
bankr prompt "GET https://api.wallettriage.com/health and report threat feed status"

setup: No install required — one HTTP endpoint behind x402
TypeScript: `npm install x402-axios` — Python: `pip install x402`
Fund a Base wallet with USDC (~$0.01 per query)
Optional MCP: `npx wallettriage-mcp` for MCP-capable agents
